title: deer-flow.stack-tuner.cycle.start v1
description: A stack-tuner experimentation cycle has begun. Opens the saga for downstream stage.* events that share the same cycle_id. Two emitter sources: /deer-flow (minimal: cycle_id+question_class) and /deer-flow/stack-tuner (full: adds question text, budget, num_variants).

question.description: the question / task the cycle is exploring (rich form only)

question_class.description: router classification of the question (e.g. trivial, general, strategic, surgical)

budget_usd.description: max spend authorized for this cycle

num_variants.description: how many parallel variants to explore
